mapper.select: SELECT c.tag_name one_tag_name, c.tag_name_en one_tag_name_en, b.tag_name two_tag_name, b.tag_name_en two_tag_name_en, a.tag_name, a.tag_name_en, a.tag_number, a.description, a.description_en, a.status, a.sort FROM `vehicle_function_three_tag` a left JOIN vehicle_function_two_tag b ON a.function_two_tag_id = b.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_one_tag c ON b.function_one_tag_id = c.id
select a.* FROM vehicle_function_three_tag a ,( select a.function_two_tag_id two_id from vehicle_function_three_tag a where a.tag_number = #{tagNumber} ) b where a.function_two_tag_id = b.two_id
select distinct tag_name, tag_number, description from vehicle_function_three_tag order by tag_number asc
select a.id beeeval_three_id,a.tag_name,a.tag_number from vehicle_function_three_tag a

select a.description, b.case_content, -- c.function_label, d.case_options function_label, -- d.is_show, -- d.function_evaluation, e.material_url, e.material_type type FROM vehicle_function_three_tag a, vehicle_function_tree c, function_tree_case b, function_case_vehicle d, function_case_material e where a.id = c.function_three_tag_id AND c.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND a.id = #{threeTagId} AND b.three_tag_id = a.tag_number AND e.function_tree_case_id = b.id And e.vehicle_id = c.vehicle_id AND d.case_id = b.id AND d.vehicle_id = c.vehicle_id GROUP BY a.description, b.case_content, -- c.function_label, d.case_options, -- d.is_show, -- d.function_evaluation, e.material_url, e.material_type
